description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the staged 1880-census Price results against tree subject I1 (Sarah Ann Mullen Price, b. 1875 Dodge County, Wisconsin). Both staged candidates carry the surname Price, so name-string similarity alone can't separate them; match scoring against the subject cleanly does. matchRank 1 is Sarah M. Price (the 'M.' initial is the middle name Mullen honoring the mother's maiden surname) — b. 1875 Wisconsin, Dodge County, matchScore 0.91. matchRank 2 is the same-surname distractor Sarah Price — b. 1870 New York, Milwaukee County, matchScore 0.24, already attached to a different tree person. checkAttachments folded in: the strong match is unattached (new evidence to extract); the distractor is attachedToOther. Reuses the recordIds/names/places/collection from record-search-1880-census-price-sarah. Matched on subjectId; independent of the stagedResultsRef handle (a per-run uuid).
